parameters: B cell replicates SRR891268 and SRR891269; CD4 T cell day-1 replicates SRR891275 and SRR891276; paired-end FASTQ input from Buenrostro et al. 2013
fastp --detect_adapter_for_pe --thread 24 or 32 depending on run host; paired HTML and JSON QC reports written per sample

call-footprints --score footprint on each corrected cut-site bigWig over merged_peaks.bed; default footprint settings fp_min=20, fp_max=50, flank_min=10, flank_max=30, smooth=1

diff-footprints with four replicate footprint bigWigs, --cond-names Bcell Bcell Tcell Tcell, JASPAR2026 CORE vertebrates non-redundant motifs, --replicate-report auto, --skip-excel, and either --normalization none or --normalization sample-quantile
Default motif scan p-value 1e-4, bound/unbound threshold 0.001, cluster threshold 0.5, and pseudocount estimated from background unless supplied
